title: Shared Pets
description: Share your tamed wolves and cats with friends! Add co-owners, configure follow modes, transfer ownership — all via in-game GUI. Works even when the main owner is offline. Supports  : Fabric, Forge & NeoForge.
body:
# Shared Pets

  **Share your tamed wolves and cats with other players!**

  Shared Pets lets multiple players co-own tamed animals on a
  server.
  Assign co-owners, configure follow modes, and transfer full
  ownership —
  all through an in-game GUI, without any commands.

  ---

  ## ✨ Features

  ### 👥 Co-ownership
  - Craft a **Shared Collar** and right-click your tamed wolf or
   cat to open
    the management GUI
  - Invite up to **5 co-owners** per pet — they receive a
  clickable
    chat message to **[Accept]** or **[Decline]**
  - Co-owners can **sit / stand** the pet just like the owner
  - Invitations expire automatically after **60 seconds**

  ### 🔁 Ownership Transfer
  - Transfer full ownership to another online player
  - The target must **[Accept]** or **[Decline]** via chat
  - On acceptance: the new owner takes over and the co-owner
  list is reset

  ### 🐺 Wolf Follow Modes (configurable per wolf)
  | Mode | Behaviour |
  |------|-----------|
  | **Owner** | Follows the main owner (falls back to a co-owner if owner is offline) |
  | **Co-Owner** | Follows a specific co-owner you select |
  | **Auto** | Follows the nearest owner or co-owner |

  Wolves also **defend all owners and co-owners** and assist
  when any of
  them attacks — owners and co-owners can never be targeted by
  their own wolf.

  ### 🐱 Cat Support
  - Co-owners can sit / stand cats
  - Cats follow co-owners when the main owner is offline

  ### 🌐 Multiplayer-friendly
  - Everything works **when the main owner is offline**
  - Data is saved via NBT directly on the entity — no extra
  files needed
  - Fully synced between server and clients

  ---

  ## 📖 How to Use

  1. **Craft** a Shared Collar (2 Leather + 4 Gold Ingots)
  2. **Right-click** your tamed wolf or cat while holding the
  collar
  3. Use the GUI to:
     - Invite co-owners (they get a clickable chat notification)
     - Configure wolf follow mode
     - Transfer ownership

  ---

  ## 🌍 Translations

  English · Français · Español · Deutsch · Italiano · Português
  (BR)

  ---

  ## 🔧 Compatibility

  | Minecraft        | Fabric | Forge | NeoForge |              
  |------------------|--------|-------|----------|
  | 1.20.1 – 1.20.4 | ✅     | ✅    | —        |               
  | 1.20.5 – 1.20.6 | ✅     | —     | ✅       |           
  | 1.21.1           | ✅     | —     | ✅       |
  | 1.21.11          |✅     | —     | ✅       |

  > **Required on both client and server.** The GUI screens
  (owner management,
  > co-owner selection, ownership transfer) run client-side.
